description: Top test cases extracted from Jira CSV (Knowledge/Jira (2).csv). 205 testable cases across 13 modules, categorized and ready for AI test generation.
source: Knowledge/Jira (2).csv - 16,607 rows, 234 records, 205 testable test cases

OT: OT Request with NormalOTPolicy - allowed shifts calculate by employee request time, non-allowed by shift
OT Request on Off Day with Include From/To policy - calculates by request time
OT Request on PH Day with Allowed Shifts policy - calculates by DutyIn-DutyOut
OT Policy Not Used - approved OT hours = 0
OT Request with file attachment required vs optional vs not used
OT Request exceeds Max OT Hour limit - should show error
OT Approve batch view - select all, preview, approve with reason
OT Report - verify OT hours, approved/rejected status
Leave: Sanity Testing for all leave functions - Save/Update/Delete, form validation, pagination, column filter, ascending/descending
Leave Type Setup - CRUD, validation, duplicate prevention, gender-specific options
Leave Policy Setup - Policy Group, Leave Policy List, Additional Setup, Combine Leave
Leave Request - Create with multi-day, label, remark, half-day options, file attachment
Leave Request - Validation: required fields, date range, balance check, prerequisite leave
Leave Approve - Batch view, filter by period/status/type, select all, preview, approve with reason
Leave Approve - Normal view, individual approval/rejection with reason
Leave Status Report - View leave balance, history, approval status
Attendance: Attendance Lock - Select company/department, enter comment, select period, preview, confirm
Attendance Request - On behalf, select employee, attendance type (Ferry Late, etc.), reason
Attendance Approve - Batch view, select all, preview, filter by approved, approve with reason
Duty Roster - Create, edit, delete roster entries
Late Report - Generate late attendance report, filter by date range/department
Manual Attendance Import - Upload Excel template, verify import results
Employee: Employee Setup - CRUD, custom fields, additional information
Employee Policy - Assign policies, verify application
Employee Resignation - Process resignation, verify final settlement
Opening Leave Balance - Set initial leave balances for employees
Custom Field Setup - Create custom fields for employee records
Payroll: Payment Calculation - Verify salary computation with OT, allowances, deductions
Payment Addition/Deduction - Add ad-hoc payments or deductions
Salary Adjustment - Adjust employee salary, verify effective date
Reports: Custom Report - Create custom report with selected columns and filters
Transfer Report - Employee transfer history report
Supervisor Dashboard - View team attendance, leave, OT summaries
People Directory - Search and view employee profiles
Appraisal Report - Performance appraisal results report

commonPatterns: All grid views support: Search/Filter, Pagination, Column Sorting, Column Visibility, Export to Excel
All forms support: Add New, Edit, Delete, Save, Cancel, Import/Export Excel
All approval workflows: Batch View, Select All, Preview, Approve/Reject with Reason
All modules: Include Inactive / Active Only filters
Common error patterns: Validation on required fields, duplicate prevention, date range validation
qualityInsights: Leave module has highest test case count (55) and defect density
OT module has most test cases (59) with complex policy combinations
Attendance module (45) covers lock, request, approve, roster, late report
Grid UI features frequently tested: View Sensitive Info, Copy Employee Filter, Choosing Column
Many test cases include Burmese language test data and expected results
Mobile app testing (5 cases): Check In/Out, Announcement, Virtual Employee ID, Attendance Request
template:
### Jira Test Case Library
You are generating automated Playwright tests for GlobalHR Cloud.

## SOURCE DATA
This skill contains 205 real test cases extracted from the QA team's Jira system (16,607 rows of Jira export data).

## MODULE PRIORITY (by test case count)
1. OT (59 cases) - Complex policy combinations, file attachments, max hour limits
2. Leave (55 cases) - CRUD, validation, policy setup, approval workflows, status reports
3. Attendance (45 cases) - Lock, request, approve, duty roster, late report, manual import
4. Employee (19 cases) - Setup, policies, resignation, opening balance, custom fields
5. Payroll (17 cases) - Calculation, addition/deduction, salary adjustment
6. Reports (14 cases) - Custom reports, transfer, supervisor dashboard, people directory
7. Other (9 cases) - Cross-module and miscellaneous
8. Mobile (5 cases) - Check In/Out, Announcement, Virtual ID, Attendance Request
9. Master Data (3 cases) - Company, Department, Grade, Designation setup
10. Settings (3 cases) - Application options, device mapping, zone mapping, user levels
11. Recruitment (2 cases) - Job post list, applicant form
12. Daily Tasks (2 cases) - Task setup, product, assign, location
13. Performance (1 case) - Appraisal report, assignment, question group setup

## COMMON PATTERNS
- All grids: Search/Filter, Pagination, Column Sorting, Column Visibility, Export
- All forms: Add New, Edit, Delete, Save, Cancel, Import/Export Excel
- All approvals: Batch View, Select All, Preview, Approve/Reject with Reason
- All modules: Include Inactive / Active Only filters

## USE THIS SKILL
When generating tests for any module, reference the topTestCases for that module above.
Each test case name maps to a real QA test scenario with known expected behavior.
